creator: euan@potensol.com
text:
(In reply to Franz Bettag from comment #0)

Thanks for your submission. I am the port maintainer. I will certainly take a good look at it and incorporate the changes.

Files can't simply be missing from plist, the "make check-plist" would highlight them. However, I'll double check myself.

I intend to update to the latest version soon. I'll make your suggested changed at the same time. In the meantime, you can use your own modified version of the port.

Please submit your changes as a patch. The shar file is only for new ports. To do this make a copy of the existing (upstream) port directory (opensips) called opensips.orig, make your changes to the opensips directory. Then run something like the following:

# diff -ruN opensips.orig opensips > update.diff
